case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LEE, STANLEY Y.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, STANLEY Y. IF NO APPEARANCES ON 6/23/03 @ 1:30 PM, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-24-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-26-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
